channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil prices fall nearly 4% after U.S. Energy Secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing
item.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.

item.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
item.description: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

item.title: Home sales surged in May to the highest level since December
item.description: Home sales rebounded in May as mortgage rates dropped back a bit in April, but prices are still rising.

item.title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
item.description: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.

item.title: How to hedge your portfolio against the Nasdaq-100 using QQQ put spreads
item.description: Overbought readings do not predict when the pullback happens, but they do tell you that when it comes, it is likely to be sharp. Friday was a good example.

item.title: S&P 500 gives up gain as chip stock comeback fizzles: Live updates
item.description: A rally in chip stocks boosted the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite on Monday.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
item.description: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.

item.title: Apple shares slide after big Siri AI reveal
item.description: Apple unveiled new artificial intelligence software at WWDC, highlighted by its long-awaited update to Siri.

item.title: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
item.description: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.

item.title: Inflation data threatens to derail market comeback. How the S&P 500 may react
item.description: Investors will be watching core inflation in May closely to see just how long higher prices from the U.S.-Iran war may last, according to JPMorgan.

item.title: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
item.description: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.

item.title: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
item.description: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.

item.title: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
item.description: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.

item.title: 5 takeaways from airline CEOs' biggest annual gathering
item.description: Airline CEOs met in Rio de Janeiro at IATA, the International Air Transport Association's annual meeting.

item.title: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO
item.description: The deal marks a bold experiment in the wealth management industry that could shift the balance of power from advisory firms to wealthy groups of investors.

item.title: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
item.description: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.

item.title: Upstart chipmakers keep challenging Nvidia. This time it's Microsoft-backed D-Matrix
item.description: Nvidia challenger D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip it says is 10 times faster than a GPU and bypasses the memory shortage.

item.title: Stellantis tells owners of 1.3 million Jeeps to park outside over fire concerns
item.description: Stellantis said the recall covers 2021 through 2025 model-year Jeep Wrangler SUVs and Jeep Gladiator trucks.

item.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
item.description: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.

item.title: We're booking more profits in a tech stock as the market wobbles ahead of a big IPO
item.description: We'll realize a gain of about 90% on shares bought in April.

item.title: 36-year-old's fitness company was 'a week away' from bankruptcy—now it's valued at $10.1 billion
item.description: Whoop was born from founder and CEO Will Ahmed's obsession with tracking his own fitness and recovery as a college athlete.

item.title: Low income? You can still borrow for college. Here’s where to start
item.description: Low income? You can still borrow for college. We found ways to help bridge the gap between what college costs and what you can afford.

item.title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
item.description: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.

item.title: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation
item.description: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.

item.title: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model
item.description: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.

item.title: Gold could slump another 20% by September, says Citi — here's why
item.description: Since the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran war on Feb. 28, gold's reputation as a "safe haven" asset in times of turmoil has come under pressure.

item.title: Trump's trade war has a new target: forced labor. The case behind it is far from simple
item.description: Ending forced labor is a goal most countries around the world have but few actually have success, including the U.S. Can Trump's tariffs change that?

item.title: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines
item.description: Airline CEOs complained that manufacturers aren't making enough of their engines and that they're falling short on reliability.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee
item.description: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."

item.title: Jim Cramer warns key pillars of the bull market are beginning to crumble
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that he's becoming more cautious on stocks after several pillars of his bullish outlook have come under pressure.
